# Database Architecture

## Data Storage
- **Type:** None — stateless application
- **Persistence:** No database, no ORM, no migrations

## Data Model
The application uses in-memory data structures only:

### MOODS Dictionary
```python
MOODS: dict[str, MoodProfile]
```
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `bpm` | `int` | Base tempo for the soundscape |
| `layers` | `list[str]` | Audio layer identifiers |
| `reverb` | `float` | Reverb amount (0–1) |
| `description` | `str` | Human-readable description |

### LAYER_DESCRIPTIONS Dictionary
```python
LAYER_DESCRIPTIONS: dict[str, str]
```
Static mapping of layer names to descriptions.

## Entities
| Entity | Fields | Persistence |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| `MoodProfile` | `bpm`, `layers`, `reverb`, `description` | In-memory dict |
| `AudioLayer` | `name`, `description` | In-memory dict |

## No External Data
- No user data stored
- No configuration files read at runtime
- All mood data is hardcoded in `moods.py`
